title: Thelypteris arfakiana
taxonomy: Thelypteris arfakiana belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This species is a type of fern, a group of vascular plants characterized by their leafy fronds. The genus Thelypteris is a group of deciduous and evergreen ferns. Thelypteris arfakiana is native to New Guinea, a region known for its diverse and unique flora.
